meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.20 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] 分数 (fraction) with no referent: the quoted ASCII target 1/4 does not occur in the preceding text 本文, so it is a self-contained forward reference (§6.20 Error conditions, parallel to §6.16) — the quoted run is itself typeset. §8 reference rendering splits on the ASCII slash into 1⁄4; serialization reconstructs the directive byte-exact (§7.6). Offsets from the §4 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor. Exercises the ASCII slash in a self-contained shape.
